---
title: "Authentication in {restatis}"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Authentication in {restatis}}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(restatis)
```
